title: Windows PowerShell Download Cradle
description: Detects PowerShell download cradle patterns commonly used to fetch and execute remote payloads including Invoke-WebRequest, Net.WebClient, and Start-BitsTransfer.
query: ('Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Events' or 'Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Operational Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'SOC Windows Sysmon Logs') and ((('Process Name' like '*powershell.exe' or 'Process Name' like '*pwsh.exe')) and (('Command Line' like '*Invoke-WebRequest*' or 'Command Line' like '*Net.WebClient*' or 'Command Line' like '*DownloadString*' or 'Command Line' like '*DownloadFile*' or 'Command Line' like '*Start-BitsTransfer*' or 'Command Line' like '*Invoke-RestMethod*')))
